description: Create an optical schematic diagram in LibreCAD featuring a Z-fold beam path. The project requires three layers: 'COMPONENTS' (Cyan), 'BEAM' (Red), and 'LABELS' (White). The 'COMPONENTS' layer must contain a Laser Source (50x20mm rectangle, right edge centered at 0,0), Mirror 1 (40mm line centered at 300,0, oriented for 90-degree upward reflection), Mirror 2 (40mm line centered at 300,200, oriented for 90-degree leftward reflection), a Lens (Ellipse centered at 150,200 with 40mm vertical major axis and 10mm horizontal minor axis), and a Detector (20x20mm square, right edge centered at 0,200). The 'BEAM' layer should feature a polyline connecting the Laser (0,0), Mirror 1 (300,0), Mirror 2 (300,200), and Detector (0,200). On the 'LABELS' layer, annotate the components as 'LASER', 'M1', 'M2', and 'DETECTOR', and include a note stating the calculated total path length in the format 'Total Path: [Value] mm'. Save the completed schematic to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/optical_setup.dxf.
